title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!
